review: Superb service. GOX pickup and drop. Booked Baleno Automatic 2025 model. Car was top notch, clean and smooth. I'll be booking from VK now onwards whenever I visit Goa. One thing that stood out was their timely pick-up and drop, even though I had different airports for arrival and departure. The coordination was flawless, and I didn’t face even a minute of delay. The car provided was very clean, almost brand new, and ran perfectly throughout my trip without a single issue.
name: Mayank Daga

review: Awesome experience. I rented 2 cars and both of them were very clean and technically fine. Owner is really good, he himself came to deliver the car. The best part was when I returned the cars, they only took 5 min for inspection which shows they dont want to scam people. I can easily recommend this to anyone wants to rent a car in Goa. I'm extremely happy with the self driven car on rent it was of good quality. I recommend them for taking car on rent in Goa.
name: Shishir Gautam

review: Vishal is prompt n man of his word. I messaged him n 3 other vendors at the same time after seeing their details from google n insta; out of all vishal responded promptly n with genuine price as well. He gave me a baleno 2023 model , V good condition, neat n clean . He is soft spoken & well mannered. I STRONGLY RECOMMEND VISHAL FROM - VK CAR RENTAL GOA. .Highly recommend both the car and its fantastic owner to anyone looking for a seamless and enjoyable ride!
name: AD AD

review: Car was really good. Baleno automatic 2025 model. Pickup and drop were smooth. We enjoyed the ride. Vishal ji the owner is really humble and a great guy. Rahul bhaiya made us wait 20 mins at drop point, we called him 40 mins prior to reaching airport. Please ask him to be on or before time for others. It would be appreciated. Rest i will definitely recommend you with my group. The car is cleaned and well maintained. I will obviously recommend VK Goa Car Rental.
name: Achal Khandelwal

review: Had a great experience with Vishal, who’s truly an amazing vendor for car rentals in Goa. He made sure the car was in perfect condition and delivered it right on time, without any hassle. The entire process was smooth and enjoyable. If you’re ever looking for a reliable car rental service in Goa, you can blindly trust this guy—he’s absolutely fantastic. A big thank you to him for making the trip so convenient and stress-free!
name: Amruta Bangera

review: VK Car Rental provided a hassle-free experience with a well-maintained vehicle that ran perfectly. The team was honest, fair, and incredibly helpful throughout the process. Their pricing was competitive, making it excellent value for money. Highly recommend their services!  The car quality and overall service provided by the rental agency were excellent. The vehicle was clean, well-maintained, and delivered on time. However, there were a couple of issues worth mentioning.
name: Arvind Mankala
